List available instruction modules shipped with the package

instructions_available.Rd

Discovers instruction modules from inst/instructions/*.md at runtime.

Usage

instructions_available(include_path = FALSE)

Arguments

include_path

Logical; if TRUE, return a data.frame with module names and file paths. If FALSE (default), return a character vector of module names.

Value

If include_path = FALSE, a character vector of module names. If include_path = TRUE, a data.frame with columns module and path.

On this page
